Operation 'updateLibrary' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the operation's purpose (detecting file changes), scope (configured directories), execution model (asynchronous), expected duration context, return value, and side effects (incomplete query results during scan). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Rescan music library for new and updated files
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a rescan of the music library to detect new, modified, or deleted audio files. This operation indexes the configured music directories and updates the library database. The rescan process runs asynchronously and may take several minutes depending on library size. Returns confirmation of scan initiation. Library queries may return incomplete results during an active scan.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Improved version explains the operation's purpose (detecting file changes), scope (configured directories), execution model (asynchronous), expected duration context, return value, and side effects (incomplete query results during scan). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'clearQueue' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs expansion to clarify behavior during active playback, the resulting state after clearing, and what happens next. This helps AI agents understand the operation's side effects and how it interacts with current playback state.

data.description_suggestion: Removes all queued tracks from the playback queue. If playback is currently active, the currently playing track continues until completion or manual stop. After clearing, the queue will be empty and subsequent play commands will require new tracks to be queued. Returns confirmation of queue cleared status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs expansion to clarify behavior during active playback, the resulting state after clearing, and what happens next. This helps AI agents understand the operation's side effects and how it interacts with current playback state.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive system information about the Moode Audio player including hardware details, software version, network configuration, and audio settings. Returns a SystemInfo object containing device status, capabilities, and current configuration state.

message: Operation 'play' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity about behavior and effects. Added details about what happens when play is called (starts queued track or resumes), edge cases (no track queued), return value (PlaybackStatus), and side effects (continuous playback until user intervention) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Starts audio playback of the currently queued track or resumes playback if paused. If no track is queued, the operation has no effect. Returns the updated PlaybackStatus reflecting the new playback state. Playback will continue until paused, stopped, or a new track is selected.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about behavior and effects. Added details about what happens when play is called (starts queued track or resumes), edge cases (no track queued), return value (PlaybackStatus), and side effects (continuous playback until user intervention) to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'pause' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Added context about position preservation, relationship to play operation, return value (PlaybackStatus), and idempotent behavior (no effect if already paused) to help AI agents understand the operation's semantics and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Pauses the currently playing track, preserving the current playback position. The track can be resumed from this position using the play operation. Returns the updated PlaybackStatus with paused state. Has no effect if playback is already paused or stopped.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added context about position preservation, relationship to play operation, return value (PlaybackStatus), and idempotent behavior (no effect if already paused) to help AI agents understand the operation's semantics and effects.

message: Operation 'stop' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks distinction from pause and missing operational details. Added clarification about position reset behavior, difference from pause, return value (PlaybackStatus), and effect on subsequent play operations to improve AI agent decision-making about which operation to use.

data.description_suggestion: Stops audio playback and resets the playback position to the beginning of the current track. Unlike pause, stopping clears the playback state. Returns the updated PlaybackStatus with stopped state. Subsequent play operations will start from the track beginning.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks distinction from pause and missing operational details. Added clarification about position reset behavior, difference from pause, return value (PlaybackStatus), and effect on subsequent play operations to improve AI agent decision-making about which operation to use.

message: Operation 'next' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is incomplete. Added context about queue/playlist navigation, edge case handling (last track behavior), return value (PlaybackStatus), and playback continuation behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's full effects and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Advances playback to the next track in the current queue or playlist. If the current track is the last in the queue, behavior depends on repeat settings. Returns the updated PlaybackStatus with the new track information. Playback continues automatically if it was playing before the skip.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete. Added context about queue/playlist navigation, edge case handling (last track behavior), return value (PlaybackStatus), and playback continuation behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's full effects and when to use it.

message: Operation 'previous' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks operational context. Added details about queue navigation, edge case handling (first track behavior), return value (PlaybackStatus), and playback continuation to provide AI agents with complete understanding of the operation's behavior and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Moves playback to the previous track in the current queue or playlist. If the current track is the first in the queue, behavior depends on repeat settings. Returns the updated PlaybackStatus with the previous track information. Playback continues automatically if it was playing before the skip.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks operational context. Added details about queue navigation, edge case handling (first track behavior), return value (PlaybackStatus), and playback continuation to provide AI agents with complete understanding of the operation's behavior and effects.
